info.title: App Template Register
info.description: Register containing all schemas for the App Template application.

x-openregister.description: App Template — replace with your app description

article.title: Article
article.description: schema.org/Article — a written composition published in print or digital form. Aligned with https://schema.org/Article per ADR-011: use schema.org vocabulary instead of ad-hoc domain types whenever a standard type fits.

name.example: Getting started with the app template

description.description: A short description of the article (schema.org/description).
description.example: A worked example showing how to replace this schema with your own.

identifier.description: An external identifier for the article — ISBN, DOI, URI, etc. (schema.org/identifier).

dateCreated.description: The date the article was created (schema.org/dateCreated).

author.description: The author of the article (schema.org/author). Kept as a string for template simplicity; nest a Person object in real apps.

article-gemeente-utrecht.name: Gemeente Utrecht pilot
article-gemeente-utrecht.description: Seed article describing a realistic pilot project for a Dutch municipality. Per ADR-001 every app MUST include 3-5 realistic objects per schema so the app is immediately demonstrable after install.
article-gemeente-utrecht.author: Conduction B.V.

article-conduction-consultancy.name: Conduction consultancy engagement
article-conduction-consultancy.description: Seed article covering architecture review and ADR authoring for a consultancy engagement. Values are fictional but realistic.
article-conduction-consultancy.author: Conduction B.V.

article-travel-agency.name: Nieuw Horizon travel agency onboarding
article-travel-agency.description: Third seed article demonstrating variety of content. Re-importing is idempotent: ImportHandler matches by slug.
article-travel-agency.author: Conduction B.V.
